checkin.journal:

Tai chi with music was nice
Breakfast
Welcome for my family they arrived jet lagged like I did as well
We went for lunch to Trove
We shopped in Dubai
Got new sneakers
We watched a movie - Johny English 2011 version - was fun
We bought clothes for Domen and David
Vesna made popcorns
Went to bed before 12 finally haha
Still super sleepy in afternoon, lets hope cinema in evening didnt woke me up too much and killed my long sleep and killed my
